hero.title: Ergo

hero.description: The globally-neutral settlement layer for programmable money.
hero.message1: Decentralized Money for a Free Society
hero.message2: The globally-neutral settlement layer for programmable money.
hero.message3: The open-source home of digital freedom
hero.message4: Join the movement for decentralized, open-source money

seo.defaultTitle: Ergo Platform - Resilient Blockchain for Contractual Money
seo.defaultDescription: Ergo builds advanced cryptographic features and radically new DeFi functionality on the rock-solid foundations laid by a decade of blockchain theory and development.
seo.keywords: blockchain, cryptocurrency, DeFi, smart contracts, Ergo, UTXO, proof of work

whyErgo.title: WHY ERGO?
whyErgo.subtitle: A resilient blockchain platform combining proven principles with cutting-edge innovation

fairAndSecure.title: FAIR & SECURE
fairAndSecure.subtitle: Proof-of-Work Foundation
fairAndSecure.description: No ICO, no premine. ASIC-resistant mining ensures true decentralization and long-term security for everyone.

powerfulAndFlexible.title: POWERFUL & FLEXIBLE
powerfulAndFlexible.subtitle: Advanced Smart Contracts
powerfulAndFlexible.description: eUTXO model + ErgoScript enable secure, expressive DeFi applications that push the boundaries of what is possible.

sustainable.title: SUSTAINABLE
sustainable.subtitle: Built to Last
sustainable.description: Storage rent mechanism prevents blockchain bloat and ensures network health with predictable costs for decades to come.

privacy.title: PRIVACY FIRST
privacy.description: Optional privacy with Sigma protocols for confidential transactions.

community.title: COMMUNITY DRIVEN
community.description: Open-source development led by passionate contributors worldwide.

developer.title: DEVELOPER FRIENDLY
developer.description: World-class docs, tools, and support make building on Ergo easy.

audiencePaths.title: GET STARTED WITH ERGO
audiencePaths.subtitle: Choose your path and start your journey in the Ergo ecosystem

developers.title: For Developers
developers.description: Build advanced DeFi applications and dApps with ErgoScript

miners.title: For Miners
miners.description: Join the ASIC-resistant Autolykos mining network

users.title: For Users
users.description: Explore the ecosystem and start using Ergo

investors.title: For Investors
investors.description: Learn about investment opportunities in the Ergo ecosystem

blogSection.title: LATEST FROM THE ERGO BLOG
blogSection.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest news, technical insights, and community updates from the Ergo ecosystem

subscribeSection.title: STAY IN THE LOOP
subscribeSection.subtitle: Get Ergo releases, grants, dev calls, and top articles delivered weekly
subscribeSection.privacyNotice: We respect your privacy. Your email is only used for Ergo updates and will never be shared with third parties. You can unsubscribe at any time with one click.

rosenBridge.title: Rosen Bridge
rosenBridge.subtitle: Connecting Ergo's Ecosystem
rosenBridge.description: Seamlessly transfer assets between Ergo and other leading blockchains like Bitcoin, Ethereum, Cardano, and BSC with Rosen Bridge. Our secure Watcher & Guard system unlocks cross-chain liquidity and new DeFi possibilities.

ergoMixer.title: ErgoMixer
ergoMixer.subtitle: Non-Custodial Privacy Protocol
ergoMixer.description: ErgoMixer provides cutting-edge privacy solutions using Sigma protocols and ring signatures. Enjoy complete financial privacy while maintaining regulatory compliance through optional transparency features.

sigmaUSD.title: SigmaUSD
sigmaUSD.subtitle: Algorithmic Stablecoin Protocol
sigmaUSD.description: SigmaUSD is a crypto-backed algorithmic stablecoin protocol built on Ergo. It provides a decentralized way to create stable value without relying on traditional banking systems or centralized reserves.

gaming.title: Ergo Gaming Ecosystem
gaming.subtitle: Blockchain Gaming Platform
gaming.description: Experience the future of gaming with true asset ownership, play-to-earn mechanics, and decentralized tournaments. Powered by Ergo's efficient and secure blockchain infrastructure.
